title: Cobbe Hard Water Filter Shower Head and Hose with 20 Stage Filter, 6 Spray Jet Modes High Pressure Bathroom Shower Head, Large Powerful Handheld Showerhead for Residual Chlorine Remove (Black)
features: 【NOTE】Please Do not use this shower head with an electric shower. The filter is directly attached to the shower head handle, no secondary installation is required. The main picture is a perspective view of the filter, the actual picture is subject to the detailed picture.

【Upgraded 20 Stage Filter Shower Head】The hard water filter shower head with mineral beads has 20 layers of filtration, which can remove impurities and pollutants such as residual chlorine and heavy metals (lead, mercury, nickel, chromium) in the hard water to help restore health and smoothness skin and soft hair.

【 6 Modes Shower Head】This high pressure handheld shower head has 6 optional modes. You can easily press the paddle with one hand to switch between rain, massage, oxygenated shower and other different modes. The multi-functional large shower head can meet daily showering, child and pet bathing, and bathroom cleaning.

【ABS Material】:The shower is made of advanced ABS environmental protection material. Ensure hard and durable at the same time, the handheld shower can effectively heat insulation. Stainless steel hose makes the shower set lightweight, high toughness and rust-proof.

【Water Saving Shower Head】This shower head uses a unique internal structure and pressurization technology, as well as regular silicone nozzle distribution, which ensures stronger water flow and stable water pressure while saving water. The large-panel high-pressure shower head brings a full-coverage rain shower experience, allowing you to enjoy a comfortable rain shower.
